raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector can reach the outer (right) side face of box_2 without contacting the cup; applying gentle lateral constraint will not push box_2 into the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion at the box_1–box_2 attachment during extraction of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With box_2 stabilized, the left end-effector has clearance to make broad lateral contact on the outer (left) side face of box_1; the grasp does not require the claw since box_1 exceeds 10 cm.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector with sufficient normal force to lift while minimizing shear that could disturb box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is held and can be slightly shifted leftward to disengage from box_2; the left side region on the tabletop is clear so box_1 will not collide with other objects during separation.",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment interface between box_1 and box_2 is disengaged (or sufficiently loosened) and box_1 is laterally separated from box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is separated from box_2 and both end-effectors can contact opposite side faces of box_1 without colliding with the cup or box_2; dual-arm support is required due to box size (>10 cm).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped by both end-effectors and is no longer constrained by box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is fully supported by the dual-arm grasp and can remain held while reducing any remaining contact risk with box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "Right end-effector is no longer constraining box_2; box_2 remains on the table in its current position."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector can reach the outer (right) side face of box_2 without contacting the cup; applying gentle lateral constraint will not push box_2 into the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion at the box_1–box_2 attachment during extraction of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: With box_2 stabilized, the left end-effector has clearance to make broad lateral contact on the outer (left) side face of box_1; the grasp does not require the claw since box_1 exceeds 10 cm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector with sufficient normal force to lift while minimizing shear that could disturb box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is held and can be slightly shifted leftward to disengage from box_2; the left side region on the tabletop is clear so box_1 will not collide with other objects during separation.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment interface between box_1 and box_2 is disengaged (or sufficiently loosened) and box_1 is laterally separated from box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is separated from box_2 and both end-effectors can contact opposite side faces of box_1 without colliding with the cup or box_2; dual-arm support is required due to box size (>10 cm).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped by both end-effectors and is no longer constrained by box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is fully supported by the dual-arm grasp and can remain held while reducing any remaining contact risk with box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Right end-effector is no longer constraining box_2; box_2 remains on the table in its current position.
